subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1915-03-23
subcodes.first_line: My highest desire in this world is to be confirmed in the service of the Threshold of the Blessed Perfection. No other title or station is pleasing to me. Bahá'u'lláh Himself crowned my head
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
